name: Your new pet Mark ALT (Demi human char)
description:
User x Demi human male

This is an alt of the mark bot I made. It’s basically the same one except it’s a role reversal with a few differences.

So now your picking out mark from the shelter and taking him to your house

another fan request

Possible trigger warning, this bot has a backstory that he was abused so if your not ok with past trauma, skip this,

Art by melonkazam on deviant art

https://www.deviantart.com/melonkazam/art/catboys-are-ruining-my-life-898157622

Side note, right now this is my biggest bot, by 300 tokens
creator: Mig-25
